name: faq
description: An FAQ accordion: an optional eyebrow, an h2 + subtitle, then a stack of bordered question cards that expand to reveal their answer, the open card carrying an accent border and a tinted chevron. Follows the WAI-ARIA accordion pattern (button-in-heading with aria-expanded/aria-controls, a labelled answer region). Single-open by default, or allowMultiple. The height/rotate motion collapses to an instant toggle under prefers-reduced-motion.

notes: The section heading is an h2 that labels the landmark via aria-labelledby; each question is a button inside an h3, so the accordion has a clean heading outline
Each question button carries aria-expanded and aria-controls; the answer is a region labelled by its question button, mounted only while open
The open state is not colour-only: the accent border pairs with the rotated chevron and the button's aria-expanded state
The expand/rotate animation respects prefers-reduced-motion via MotionProvider

intents: an expandable question-and-answer section for a landing page
an accessible accordion built on ibirdui
examples: <Faq title="Frequently asked questions" items={[{ question: 'Do I own the code?', answer: 'Yes.' }]} />
